metadata.title: Branium — On-chain claim markets on Mantle.
metadata.description: Create a claim market, stake MNT, invite the other side, and let Branium settle the payout from agreed evidence.

common.creditLine: © 2026 Branium. All rights reserved. Powered by Branium on Mantle

footer.creditLine: © 2026 Branium. All rights reserved. Powered by Branium on Mantle

home.tagline: Write the terms. Stake MNT. Let Branium settle the payout.
home.emptyHeroSubtitle: Create a market with clear terms, stake MNT, and invite the other side. After the deadline, Branium reads the agreed source and routes the payout from the Mantle contract.
home.archiveLead: A live index of Branium markets: terms, liquidity, deadlines, and settlement anchored to explicit evidence sources.
home.archiveGlassHeadline: Branium reads the agreed source, produces a verdict, and triggers the Mantle contract to release payouts.
home.arenaSubtitleFallback: Open claims are scarce right now. Enter the arena for recent examples.
home.manifestTitle: Clear terms in. Contract payout out.
home.manifestSubtitle: No manual referee, no vague settlement, no off-chain payout. Branium uses the source you choose to settle the market.
home.manifestPillar1Body: The market defines the source, deadline, and winning sides before anyone stakes.
home.manifestPillar2Body: Outcomes are tied to explicit terms and proof sources, not opinion battles after the fact.
home.manifestPillar3Body: When conditions resolve, settlement executes immediately and payouts are distributed automatically.

challengeQuestionExamples.question: e.g. BTC hits $100k this week
challengeQuestionExamples.creator: BTC reaches or exceeds $100k this week

challengeQuestionExamples.question: e.g. Will it rain tomorrow in Buenos Aires?
challengeQuestionExamples.creator: Rain in Buenos Aires that day
challengeQuestionExamples.opponent: No rain in Buenos Aires that day

challengeQuestionExamples.question: e.g. Will GPT-5 be announced before June?
challengeQuestionExamples.creator: OpenAI announces GPT-5 before June 1

challengeQuestionExamples.question: e.g. Will Hozier win a 2027 Grammy?
challengeQuestionExamples.creator: Hozier wins at least one Grammy in 2027

create.outcomeAutofillHint: Turn the question into editable side A and side B outcome text.
create.outcomeAutofillNeedsQuestion: Write the question first so Branium can draft both sides
create.outcomeAutofillApplied: Outcome sides drafted from the question
create.pendingHint: Mantle accepted your wallet transaction. The claim will appear automatically once confirmation finishes.
create.sendThisLink: Send this link to your rival.
create.sendThisPrivateLink: Send this private link only to the people you want to invite.
create.moderationCheckFailed: Moderation check failed. Try again in a moment.
create.moderationBlocked: This claim can't be published under the current policy{codesLabel}.
create.moderationNeedsReview: This claim needs review and can't be published yet{codesLabel}.
create.moderationNeedsMoreInfo: Fill in the claim to run the policy check.
create.moderationNeedsCheck: Policy check not run yet for these terms.
create.moderationUpToDate: Policy check is up to date.
create.submittedPending: Transaction submitted to Mantle. It may take a moment to appear.
create.completeExactDeadline: Choose both an exact date and time
create.invalidStake: Stake must be greater than zero
create.rematchHint: The original terms have been prefilled. Adjust anything before publishing the rematch.
create.rematchPending: We will reuse the prior market terms once the original claim loads.
create.advancedHint: Use this for market type, category, and explicit settlement rules when the challenge needs tighter resolution terms.
create.visibilityPublicHint: Anyone can discover this challenge in the public arena and join it.
create.visibilityPrivateHint: Hide this challenge from public feeds and share the invite link directly.
create.fixedOddsHint: Example: 1.80 means a 1 stake returns 1.8 total if challengers win.
create.fixedOddsPreview: Current preview: {amount} MNT returned on a winning challenger bet.
create.settlementPlaceholder: Tell Branium exactly how this claim should be judged.
create.settlementRuleHint: Add custom judging instructions when the market needs more than the raw question text.
create.questionStrengthHint: Name the outcome, the subject, and the exact window you want Branium to judge.
create.sourceStrengthHint: Use a source page that will still show the exact result when the deadline arrives.
create.settlementStrengthHint: The clearer your settlement rule is, the easier the claim is to resolve consistently.
create.invalidStakeMin: Stake must be at least {amount} MNT
create.sourceRequired: Add a real verification source before publishing
create.settlementRuleRequired: Add a settlement rule for custom or advanced markets
create.sourceDraftHint: Paste a trusted source URL and Branium will draft challenge-ready claims you can review and publish.
create.sourceDraftInputHint: Best results come from official event pages, company announcements, earnings pages, and structured market sources.
create.sourceDraftInvalidUrl: Enter a valid source URL before generating drafts
create.sourceDraftFailed: Unable to generate claim drafts from this source right now
create.sourceDraftApplied: Draft applied to the claim form
create.qualityReviewHint: Quick checks for your question, verification source, and settlement rule. This list is informative only and does not block publishing.
create.qualityCheckHintInline: Run a quick structure check for the claim, source, deadline, and settlement wording before you publish.
create.qualityReady: Everything here looks aligned with the current claim rules.
create.qualitySpecificity: Make the question more specific so the outcome is easy to verify from one source.
create.qualitySource: Use a concrete source page instead of leaving the verification source empty or generic.
create.qualitySettlement: Advanced and custom markets should include an explicit settlement rule.
create.ticketSettlementFallback: Add a settlement rule or use the category default from the Advanced section.

sports.sourceHint: Use the official match, league, or scoreboard page for the exact event you want to settle.
sports.questionHint: Name the teams, competition, and timeframe directly in the claim.
sports.settlementTemplate: Resolve this against the official final result of the linked event. State whether extra time, penalties, or overtime count.

weather.sourceHint: Use a weather source that clearly names the location and date being measured.
weather.questionHint: Name the city or region and the exact day being judged.
weather.settlementTemplate: Resolve this using the weather reported for the named location and date on the linked source. Use the exact precipitation or temperature condition written here.

deportes.sourceHint: Use the official match, league, or scoreboard page for the exact event you want to settle.
deportes.questionHint: Name the teams, competition, and timeframe directly in the claim.
deportes.settlementTemplate: Resolve this against the official final result of the linked event. State whether extra time, penalties, or overtime count.

clima.sourceHint: Use a weather source that clearly names the location and date being measured.
clima.questionHint: Name the city or region and the exact day being judged.
clima.settlementTemplate: Resolve this using the weather reported for the named location and date on the linked source. Use the exact precipitation or temperature condition written here.

crypto.sourceHint: Use a price page that will still show the asset and quoted value at settlement time.
crypto.questionHint: Name the asset, threshold, and deadline explicitly.
crypto.settlementTemplate: Resolve this using the visible spot price on the linked source at the deadline time. Apply any threshold or line exactly as written.

culture.sourceHint: Prefer the official publication, awards page, or primary entertainment source behind the claim.
culture.questionHint: Anchor the claim to a concrete release, award, ranking, or publication event.
culture.settlementTemplate: Resolve this only from the linked official or authoritative source. Do not infer beyond the exact published result.

tech.sourceHint: Use an official product blog, press release, or changelog that will still reflect the announced fact at settlement.
tech.questionHint: Name the product, company, and the concrete milestone or date window being judged.
tech.settlementTemplate: Resolve this only from the linked official source at the deadline. Treat “announced” as a public, attributable statement from the named party.

cultura.sourceHint: Prefer the official publication, awards page, or primary entertainment source behind the claim.
cultura.questionHint: Anchor the claim to a concrete release, award, ranking, or publication event.
cultura.settlementTemplate: Resolve this only from the linked official or authoritative source. Do not infer beyond the exact published result.

custom.sourceHint: Use the official match, league, or scoreboard page for the exact event you want to settle.
custom.settlementTemplate: Resolve this exactly as written using the linked source only. If the wording or source is ambiguous, mark it unresolvable.

explore.title: THE ARENA
explore.lead: Pick your fight // Accept someone else's stake.
explore.subtitle: Pick your fight. Accept someone else's stake.
explore.quickFilterSelectAria: Filter by challenger need or expiring window
explore.quickFilterNeedsArenaOnlyHint: Only applies to Arena Live challenges
explore.minStakeArenaOnlyHint: Minimum stake filters Arena Live only
explore.openChallengesBandHint: Live claims open for a rival right now. Review the terms, inspect the source, and enter the arena.
explore.aiOpportunitiesBandHint: Opportunities surfaced by Branium from emerging signals, real-world trends, and verifiable sources—ready to review, refine, and launch as head-to-head challenges.
explore.challengeOpportunitiesHint: Source-backed intel the system believes is clear, claim-ready, and worth staking on.
explore.readyToChallengeHint: Open claims you can join right now, ranked by claim strength.
explore.noResultsDesc: Reset filters, broaden your search, or publish a new challenge.
explore.openChallengesEmptyDesc: The arena is quiet. Publish a challenge and set the tone.
explore.aiOpportunitiesEmptyDesc: Try widening the filters or come back after the next source sweep.
explore.aiOpportunitiesDisabledDesc: Source-backed dossiers are disabled in this environment right now.
explore.filtersAriaLabel: Filters: category, minimum stake, and sort order

boxing.body:
Predicting high-intensity technical exchanges. System intelligence
suggests a 68% probability of extended duration.

f1.body:
Austin race rhythm rewards tire discipline.
Our stack prices P17 as the modal outcome versus opening lines.

alvarez.imageAlt: Argentina national team — Julián Álvarez World Cup spotlight
alvarez.body:
Attack volume and draw path point to upside on the goals line.
Our read: more than six goals across the FIFA World Cup 2026.

quality.hint: Stronger claims are easier to verify and settle from one source.
quality.moderationIdle: Complete the form to run a policy check.

settlement.title: Settlement explanation
settlement.hint: This breaks down how Branium reached the final outcome using the locked source and claim rules.
settlement.ruleFallback: The locked claim wording and linked source were used as the resolution basis.
settlement.evidenceHint: This was the primary source referenced when the claim was settled.
settlement.consensusHint: The claim only settled after validator consensus on the final outcome.
settlement.noSummary: No written summary was returned. The locked source and settlement rule were still used to determine the result.

dashboard.title: MY DASHBOARD
dashboard.searchNoResultsDesc: Try another keyword or clear the search.
dashboard.filterNoResultsDesc: Try another search, or adjust category, minimum stake, or reset all filters.
dashboard.noVSDesc: Create a challenge and start competing.
dashboard.connectDesc: Link your wallet to view your claims, record, and active exposure. Your record is scoped to your address only.
dashboard.connectExploreLink: Browse active claims in the Arena
dashboard.eyebrow: All your bets in one place
dashboard.loadFailed: We couldn't refresh your challenge list. You can retry or keep working with the last loaded data.
dashboard.listFreshnessAria: Index freshness for your challenge list

holdings.searchEmpty: No stake holdings match your search. Try another name or keyword.
holdings.settlementTeaserWon: You won this challenge. Credited: {amount} MNT.
holdings.settlementTeaserLost: This challenge settled against your position.
holdings.settlementTeaserCancelled: This challenge was cancelled before a final outcome.
holdings.settlementTeaserNoVerdict: Marked settled in your list — open the challenge to see how Branium ruled.

canelo.title: Pereira vs Canelo · Over 7 rounds
canelo.bodyLead: This position settles as a win if the bout exceeds seven completed rounds.
canelo.body: Settlement is based on the official UFC result and round clock, including late-round stoppages or judges' decisions.

colapinto.title: Franco Colapinto · Finishes P17
colapinto.bodyLead: This position settles as a win if Franco Colapinto achieves a final classification of 17th (P17).
colapinto.body: Settlement is based exclusively on official FIA race results for the United States Grand Prix.

alvarez.title: Julián Álvarez · Over 7 goals · FIFA World Cup 2026
alvarez.meta: FIFA World Cup — Group stage window
alvarez.bodyLead: Position wins if Julián Álvarez records over 7 total goals during the 2026 World Cup.
alvarez.body: Settlement follows official FIFA tournament statistics for all active appearances.

dashboard.statsSectionAria: Performance summary: challenges won, challenges lost, win rate, and total winnings

vsDetail.subtitle: Track stakes and rules // Resolution in real time.
vsDetail.creator: Creator
vsDetail.marketTermsHint: These are the exact rules and economics encoded in the contract.
vsDetail.challengersHint: Stakes and payout preview for each wallet on the challenger side.
vsDetail.joinedToast: Joined with {amount} MNT. Total pool now {total} MNT.
vsDetail.challengeStakeHintFixed: At the current fixed odds, a winning challenger bet returns {payout} MNT.
vsDetail.challengeStakeHintPool: Pool odds split creator stake proportionally across the challenger side.
vsDetail.challengeStakeHintHeadToHead: Use any valid stake size your wallet can fund.
vsDetail.privateInviteHint: You need the creator's private invite link to view and join this challenge.
vsDetail.rivalryHint: Every rematch in this rivalry is linked onchain through parent claims.
vsDetail.rivalryEmpty: No rematches yet. Settle this round, then launch the next one.
vsDetail.privateLinkUnavailable: This private invite link is not available on this device. Open the original invite link again to copy it.
vsDetail.challengeUnavailable: This challenge is no longer open for staking on the current contract.
vsDetail.submittedPending: Transaction submitted to Mantle. The arena will refresh automatically.
vsDetail.settlementPendingHint: The deadline has passed. Branium will display the verdict and payout once the settlement transaction lands on Mantle.
vsDetail.sendLink: Send this link to your rival
vsDetail.expiredNoRivalHintCreator: Challenges are now closed because the deadline has passed. Cancel to reclaim your stake.
vsDetail.expiredNoRivalHintViewer: Challenges are now closed because the deadline has passed without a rival joining.
